anomalies.message: Options (A) and (D) lacked labels in source Markdown (paper lines 26/32). Labels assigned by sequence from 4-option layout. (D) content was erroneously merged into (C) — separated by source line correspondence.
Option (A) label was inside LaTeX math mode '$ (A)...$' in source paper line 72, causing parser miss. Extracted by content inspection.
Options (C) and (D) labels were inside LaTeX math mode in source paper lines 92/94. Extracted by content inspection. Section header bleeding cleaned.
